# HVAC Solver - llms.txt
# https://hvacsolver.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2025-02-28

## About This Site
HVAC Solver (hvacsolver.com) is a free technical reference site for heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. We provide engineering-grade calculators, troubleshooting guides, and reference data based on ASHRAE standards, DOE data, and real engineering methodology.

## Content Overview
- 78 technical articles covering HVAC topics
- 25+ interactive calculators for system sizing
- Reference charts (PT charts, R-value tables, MERV ratings)
- Troubleshooting guides for common HVAC problems

## Main Content Categories
1. HVAC Calculators (/hvac-calculators) - AC tonnage, BTU, CFM, heat pump sizing calculators
2. Troubleshooting (/hvac-troubleshooting) - Diagnostic guides for AC, furnace, heat pump problems
3. Efficiency (/hvac-efficiency) - SEER, AFUE, HSPF, EER, COP ratings explained
4. Installation (/hvac-installation) - Setup guides for thermostats, fans, venting
5. Insulation (/insulation) - R-value charts, MERV ratings, filter guides
6. Energy Costs (/energy-costs) - Running cost calculators for HVAC equipment
7. Refrigerants (/refrigerants) - PT charts, refrigerant types, superheat/subcooling
8. Indoor Climate (/indoor-climate) - Humidity, temperature, air quality guides
9. Water Heaters (/water-heaters) - Tank and tankless sizing guides

## Popular Calculators
- AC Tonnage Calculator (/ac-tonnage-calculator) - Size central air conditioners using Manual J methodology
- BTU Calculator (/how-many-btu-ac) - Calculate BTU requirements for room air conditioners
- Heat Pump Sizing (/heat-pump-sizing) - Size heat pumps with balance point analysis
- CFM Calculator (/cfm-calculator) - Calculate airflow for ventilation systems
- Furnace Sizing (/furnace-sizing-calculator) - Size furnaces based on climate zone and home envelope
- Mini Split Sizing (/mini-split-sizing) - Size ductless mini-split systems
- Heating BTU Calculator (/heating-btu-calculator) - Full heating load calculations
- Generator Sizing (/generator-sizing) - Size backup generators for HVAC loads

## Data Sources
All calculators and reference data are based on:
- ASHRAE Handbook of Fundamentals
- ACCA Manual J, D, and S
- DOE (Department of Energy) standards
- EPA regulations and guidelines
- Manufacturer technical specifications

## Contact
info@hvacsolver.com

https://hvacsolver.com/sitemap.xml
